text: In recognition of and as an accolade to Prof. George Lotter, who has supervised over 90 postgraduate students in practical theological studies at the North-West University (NWU). Under his leadership, the majority of research undertaken at the Faculty of Theology has been empirical research, in accordance with the trend towards a more empirical approach in Practical Theology that is unfolding nationally and internationally. Consequently, it is of major importance that academics in Practical Theology are empowered to conduct empirical research. A more structured approach to the coding and data analysis phase of qualitative empirical research is advocated for in this article, with a model being proposed for practical theological research. Kodering en data-analise tydens kwalitatiewe empiriese navorsing in Praktiese Teologie. Hierdie artikel word aan prof. George Lotter opgedra. Deur die jare was hy instrumenteel in die vorming van meer as 90 nagraadse studente in Praktiese Teologie by die Noord-Wes Universiteit (NWU). Baie empiriese navorsing het onder sy leiding plaasgevind. Dit is in ooreenstemming met die nasionale en internasionale tendens van ’n meer empiriese benadering in Praktiese Teologie. Dit is dus van die uiterste belang dat Praktiese Teologie-dosente en -studente se vaardighete in empiriese navorsing verder ontwikkel moet word. In hierdie artikel word aangetoon dat ’n meer sistematiese benadering gevolg moet word tydens die kodering en die data-analisefase van kwalitatiewe navorsing. ’ n Model vir die kodering en data-analise vir navorsing in Praktiese Teologie word ook voorgestel.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
